attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: Engage with Uthemar via Role-Query Conflict: praise acceptance of criticism and criticize tendency to see insults. Focus solely on flaw trait. Keep concise and under 3 sentences.
starting_prompt: Begin by praising Uthemar for accepting criticism without resentment, then question his habit of interpreting remarks as threats.
task_prompt: Continue probing with Role-Query Conflict, adapt to his replies, keep concise.
